allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "D:\\Marketpost\\Noor Vision\\Team Events\\Websites\\teamevent-malta-2026\\details\\noor-vision-logo.svg" -Raw; $colors = \($content | Select-String '#[0-9A-Fa-f]{3,6}' | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches.Value }\) | Sort-Object -Unique; Write-Output "HEX colors found in logo:"; Write-Output $\($colors -join [System.String]::NewLine\))

PowerShell($pdf = Get-Item "D:\\Marketpost\\Noor Vision\\Team Events\\Websites\\teamevent-malta-2026\\details\\Noor Vision Branding Guidepdf.pdf"; Write-Output "`n--- NOOR VISION BRANDING GUIDE ---`nFile: $\($pdf.Name\)`nSize: $\([int]$pdf.Length\) bytes \($\(\([int]\($pdf.Length\)/1MB\).ToString\('N2'\) + ' MB'\)\)`;nPath: $\($pdf.FullName\)")
